title: Belt Rush: Hauler Stowage for a Mining Shift
strategies: streaming Next-Fit autoloader: keep one hauler open and seal it the instant a fragment does not fit (reproduces the evaluator's weak baseline; never back-fills, scores ~0.1)
First-Fit in arrival order: drop each fragment into the first open hauler with room, else open a new one; back-fills earlier haulers and clears the streaming baseline
Best-Fit-Decreasing plus least-loaded-hauler emptying: pack big fragments first into the tightest-fitting hauler, then relocate the fragments of the least-loaded hauler to dispatch one fewer
invalid: stow every fragment into a single hauler, overflowing capacity so the plan fails validation and scores 0.0
